---
title: "survival_twothresholds"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

# ===== 1. Load input files =====
clin_pt  <- read.delim("data_clinical_patient.txt", skip = 4, check.names = FALSE)
clin_smp <- read.delim("data_clinical_sample.txt", skip = 4, check.names = FALSE)
cnv_raw  <- read.delim("all_cnv_table.txt", check.names = FALSE, quote = "\"") %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("SAMPLE_ID")

clin_smp$SAMPLE_ID <- as.character(clin_smp$SAMPLE_ID)
cnv_raw$SAMPLE_ID  <- as.character(cnv_raw$SAMPLE_ID)

cytoband_cols <- grep("^[0-9XY]+[pq]", names(cnv_raw), value = TRUE)

# ===== 2. Define a function to process + analyze given a threshold =====
run_survival_at_threshold <- function(threshold, label) {
  message("Running for threshold = ", threshold)
  
  cnv_cat <- cnv_raw %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(cytoband_cols), ~ case_when(
      .x >  threshold  ~ "Gain",
      .x < -threshold  ~ "Loss",
      TRUE             ~ "None"
    )))
  
  # Merge clinical/sample info
  sample_info <- clin_smp %>%
    select(SAMPLE_ID, PATIENT_ID, CANCER_TYPE, ONCOTREE_CODE, SAMPLE_TYPE)
  
  merged_sample <- sample_info %>%
    left_join(cnv_cat, by = "SAMPLE_ID")
  
  df <- clin_pt %>%
    select(PATIENT_ID, OS_MONTHS, OS_STATUS, SEX, DRUG_TYPE) %>%
    left_join(merged_sample, by = "PATIENT_ID") %>%
    mutate(OS = if_else(str_detect(OS_STATUS, "LIVING"), 0, 1))
  
  # ===== 3. Cytoband-level survival analysis =====
  km_sig_hits <- data.frame()
  
  for (tumor in unique(df$CANCER_TYPE)) {
    tumor_data <- df %>% filter(CANCER_TYPE == tumor, DRUG_TYPE == "PD-1/PDL-1")
    
    for (band in cytoband_cols) {
      for (comparison in c("Gain", "Loss")) {
        subset <- tumor_data %>%
          filter(!!sym(band) %in% c("None", comparison)) %>%
          mutate(CNV = factor(!!sym(band), levels = c(comparison, "None")))
        
        if (nrow(subset) >= 10 && length(unique(subset$CNV)) == 2) {
          surv_obj <- Surv(subset$OS_MONTHS, subset$OS)
          surv_diff <- survdiff(surv_obj ~ CNV, data = subset)
          km_p <- 1 - pchisq(surv_diff$chisq, df = 1)
          
          if (km_p < 0.1) {
            km_sig_hits <- rbind(km_sig_hits, data.frame(
              CANCER_TYPE = tumor,
              Cytoband = band,
              Comparison = comparison,
              KMP = signif(km_p, 3),
              N = nrow(subset),
              Threshold = threshold
            ))
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  write.csv(km_sig_hits, paste0("significant_survival_cytobands_", label, ".csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  return(df)
}

# ===== 4. Run both thresholds =====
df_0.3 <- run_survival_at_threshold(0.3, "0.3")
df_0.2 <- run_survival_at_threshold(0.2, "0.2")
```


1q41 gain in melanoma  at both thresholds 
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(gridExtra)

plot_1q41_SKCM <- function(df, label) {
  skcm <- df %>% filter(CANCER_TYPE == "Melanoma", DRUG_TYPE == "PD-1/PDL-1")
  
  subset_1q41 <- skcm %>%
    filter(`1q41` %in% c("None", "Gain")) %>%
    mutate(CNVstatus = factor(`1q41`, levels = c("Gain", "None")))
  
  if (nrow(subset_1q41) >= 10 && length(unique(subset_1q41$CNVstatus)) == 2) {
    fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS) ~ CNVstatus, data = subset_1q41)
    p <- ggsurvplot(
      fit, data = subset_1q41,
      pval = TRUE,
      risk.table = TRUE,
      palette = c("#D64045", "grey20"),
      title = paste("SKCM – 1q41 Gain vs None (Threshold =", label, ")"),
      xlab = "Survival Time (months)", ylab = "Survival probability",
      risk.table.height = 0.25,
      break.time.by = 20,
      ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 14)
    )
    
    # Just print the combined plot
    grid.arrange(p$plot, p$table, ncol = 1, heights = c(3, 1))
  }
}

# Run
plot_1q41_SKCM(df_0.3, "0.3")
plot_1q41_SKCM(df_0.2, "0.2")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(ggpubr)

plot_1q21x_SKCM <- function(df, band, label) {
  skcm <- df %>% filter(CANCER_TYPE == "Melanoma", DRUG_TYPE == "PD-1/PDL-1")
  
  subset_band <- skcm %>%
    filter(.data[[band]] %in% c("None", "Gain")) %>%
    mutate(CNVstatus = factor(.data[[band]], levels = c("Gain", "None")))
  
  if (nrow(subset_band) >= 10 && length(unique(subset_band$CNVstatus)) == 2) {
    fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_MONTHS, OS) ~ CNVstatus, data = subset_band)
    
    p <- ggsurvplot(
      fit,
      data = subset_band,
      pval = TRUE,
      risk.table = TRUE,
      palette = c("#D64045", "grey20"),
      title = paste("SKCM –", band, "Gain vs None (Threshold =", label, ")"),
      xlab = "Survival Time (months)",
      ylab = "Survival probability",
      risk.table.height = 0.25,
      break.time.by = 20,
      ggtheme = theme_classic(base_size = 14)
    )
    
    # Arrange using ggarrange
    combined_plot <- ggarrange(
      p$plot, p$table,
      ncol = 1, heights = c(3, 1),
      align = "v"
    )
    
    # Save as PNG
    outname <- paste0("SKCM_", band, "_Gain_KM_plot_", label, ".png")
    ggsave(filename = outname, plot = combined_plot, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 300)
    
  } else {
    message("Not enough data to plot: ", band)
  }
}

bands <- c("1q21.1", "1q21.2", "1q21.3")

for (band in bands) {
  plot_1q21x_SKCM(df_0.3, band, "0.3")
  plot_1q21x_SKCM(df_0.2, band, "0.2")
}
```
